ItacPersonItem.Notes: For a biographical account see Antonino Mongitore, Bibliotheca Sicula, Felicella, Palermo, Vol.II, p. 187 (BL Shelfmark:610.m.10.) Placido Reina`s emblem from Placido Reina, Urbis Messanae Notitia Historica, Lugduni Batavorum, 1723, (BL Shelfmark: L.R.302.a.2/10).
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
